'''鈭歡-f-w''' ('''gafawa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:breadcrumb|breadcrumb]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-f-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:breadcrumb|breadcrumb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-f-w
|-
! Lemma
| gafawa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gafawithi|gafawithi]] || [[word:gafawiji|gafawiji]] || [[word:gafawishi|gafawishi]] || [[word:gafawi|gafawi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gafawuthuth|gafawuthuth]] || [[word:gafawujuj|gafawujuj]] || [[word:gafawushush|gafawushush]] || [[word:gafaw|gafaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gafawuthu|gafawuthu]] || [[word:gafawuju|gafawuju]] || [[word:gafawushu|gafawushu]] || [[word:gafawu|gafawu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gafawufuth|gafawufuth]] || [[word:gafawufuj|gafawufuj]] || [[word:gafawufush|gafawufush]] || [[word:gafawuf|gafawuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gafawethe|gafawethe]] || [[word:gafaweje|gafaweje]] || [[word:gafaweshe|gafaweshe]] || [[word:gafawe|gafawe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gafawothoth|gafawothoth]] || [[word:gafawojoj|gafawojoj]] || [[word:gafawoshosh|gafawoshosh]] || [[word:gafaw|gafaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gafawotho|gafawotho]] || [[word:gafawojo|gafawojo]] || [[word:gafawosho|gafawosho]] || [[word:gafawo|gafawo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gafawofoth|gafawofoth]] || [[word:gafawofoj|gafawofoj]] || [[word:gafawofosh|gafawofosh]] || [[word:gafawof|gafawof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gafaw茂f|gafaw茂f]] || [[word:gafaw茂f|gafaw茂f]] || [[word:gafaw茂f|gafaw茂f]] || [[word:gafaw茂f|gafaw茂f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gafaw茂f茂f|gafaw茂f茂f]] || [[word:gafaw茂f茂f|gafaw茂f茂f]] || [[word:gafaw茂f茂f|gafaw茂f茂f]] || [[word:gafaw茂f茂f|gafaw茂f茂f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gafaw茂f|gafaw茂f]] || [[word:gafaw茂f|gafaw茂f]] || [[word:gafaw茂f|gafaw茂f]] || [[word:gafaw茂f|gafaw茂f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gafaw茂f|gafaw茂f]] || [[word:gafaw茂f|gafaw茂f]] || [[word:gafaw茂f|gafaw茂f]] || [[word:gafaw茂f|gafaw茂f]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gafaw忙th忙|gafaw忙th忙]] || [[word:gafaw忙j忙|gafaw忙j忙]] || [[word:gafaw忙sh忙|gafaw忙sh忙]] || [[word:gafaw忙|gafaw忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gafawathath|gafawathath]] || [[word:gafawajaj|gafawajaj]] || [[word:gafawashash|gafawashash]] || [[word:gafaw|gafaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gafawatha|gafawatha]] || [[word:gafawaja|gafawaja]] || [[word:gafawasha|gafawasha]] || [[word:gafawa|gafawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gafawafath|gafawafath]] || [[word:gafawafaj|gafawafaj]] || [[word:gafawafash|gafawafash]] || [[word:gafawaf|gafawaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:gafawasha|gafawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gogafawasha|gogafawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokigafawasha|gokigafawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:gafawn眉sha|gafawn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gogafawnkn眉sha|gogafawnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokigafawn眉sha|gokigafawn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gafawsh毛sha|gafawsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogafawnksh毛sha|gogafawnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigafawsh毛sha|gokigafawsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gafawrosha|gafawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogafawnkrosha|gogafawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigafawrosha|gokigafawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gafawmusha|gafawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafawnkmusha|gogafawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafawmusha|gokigafawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gafawsherasha|gafawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gogafawnksherasha|gogafawnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokigafawsherasha|gokigafawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:gafawngasha|gafawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gogafawnkngasha|gogafawnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokigafawngasha|gokigafawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gafawyasha|gafawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogafawnkyasha|gogafawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokigafawyasha|gokigafawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gafawyamasha|gafawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gogafawnkyamasha|gogafawnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokigafawyamasha|gokigafawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gafawn眉sh毛sha|gafawn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogafawnkn眉sh毛sha|gogafawnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigafawn眉sh毛sha|gokigafawn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gafawn眉rosha|gafawn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogafawnkn眉rosha|gogafawnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigafawn眉rosha|gokigafawn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafawn眉musha|gafawn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafawnkn眉musha|gogafawnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafawn眉musha|gokigafawn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gafawsh毛n眉sha|gafawsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogafawnksh毛n眉sha|gogafawnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigafawsh毛n眉sha|gokigafawsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gafawsh毛rosha|gafawsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogafawnksh毛rosha|gogafawnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigafawsh毛rosha|gokigafawsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafawsh毛musha|gafawsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafawnksh毛musha|gogafawnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafawsh毛musha|gokigafawsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gafawron眉sha|gafawron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogafawnkron眉sha|gogafawnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigafawron眉sha|gokigafawron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gafawrosh毛sha|gafawrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogafawnkrosh毛sha|gogafawnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigafawrosh毛sha|gokigafawrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafawromusha|gafawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafawnkromusha|gogafawnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafawromusha|gokigafawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gafawmun眉sha|gafawmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogafawnkmun眉sha|gogafawnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigafawmun眉sha|gokigafawmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gafawmush毛sha|gafawmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogafawnkmush毛sha|gogafawnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigafawmush毛sha|gokigafawmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gafawmurosha|gafawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogafawnkmurosha|gogafawnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigafawmurosha|gokigafawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:gafaw|gafaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:g忙f忙w|g忙f忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hogafaw|hogafaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hog忙f忙w|hog忙f忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogafaw|hohogafaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohog忙f忙w|hohog忙f忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉gafaw|n眉gafaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉g忙f忙w|n眉g忙f忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉gafaw|n眉n眉gafaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉g忙f忙w|n眉n眉g忙f忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂gafaw|n茂gafaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂g忙f忙w|n茂g忙f忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂gafaw|n茂n茂gafaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂g忙f忙w|n茂n茂g忙f忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lugafaw|lugafaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lug忙f忙w|lug忙f忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugafaw|lulugafaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulug忙f忙w|lulug忙f忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ligafaw|ligafaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lig忙f忙w|lig忙f忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligafaw|liligafaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilig忙f忙w|lilig忙f忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kogafaw|kogafaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kog忙f忙w|kog忙f忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogafaw|kokogafaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokog忙f忙w|kokog忙f忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kegafaw|kegafaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keg忙f忙w|keg忙f忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegafaw|kekegafaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeg忙f忙w|kekeg忙f忙w]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
